title: chrysopogon celebicus
intro: Chrysopogon celebicus, also known as vetiver grass or khus-khus, is a tropical grass native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysopogon celebicus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions. Chrysopopogon celebicus is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
